message:
perf: multi-threaded rendering and UI improvements

- Add dedicated threads for input, CDP events, and toolbar compositing
- Fix toolbar flashing on mouse move (only update on hover state change)
- Fix slow first toolbar render (wait for ready before screencast starts)
- Use fixed image IDs for content/toolbar/cursor (100/200/300)
- Add URL-aware word navigation (Ctrl/Alt+arrow stops at /, ., :, etc.)
- Add Shift+Ctrl/Alt+arrow for word selection in address bar
- Remove stderr debug prints (all debug goes to file via TERMWEB_DEBUG=1)
- Throttle toolbar display to 30fps to prevent stdout flooding
